decisions.briefing: Neutral session with NASDAQ -0.4% and S&P 500 flat — not the risk-on signal needed to justify new entries. Despite 4 open slots and $577 in cash above the $500 threshold, the playbook is clear: don't force buys on neutral days, hold dry powder, and wait for a genuine NASDAQ +2% or stronger setup. RGC stands out as the top candidate with all four conviction signals (RSI 56.6, MACD crossover, above SMA-20, volume surge), but it will keep until conditions improve.

market_education.summary_en: Markets drifted sideways to start Q3 2026 as investors balanced end-of-quarter rebalancing against cautious positioning ahead of upcoming U.S. employment data. The NASDAQ slipped 0.4% on light profit-taking in technology shares following a strong June rally, while the S&P 500 held nearly flat as defensive sectors absorbed the tech weakness. With no major macro catalyst, volume stayed below average and traders broadly adopted a wait-and-see stance.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年第三季首個交易日，市場窄幅橫行。投資者在季末再平衡操作與即將公布的美國就業數據之前普遍保持謹慎。那斯達克指數延續六月強勁反彈後的獲利回吐，小幅下滑0.4%，標普500指數則受防禦類股支撐，幾乎收平。市場缺乏明確催化劑，成交量低迷，投資者普遍觀望。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Dry powder means keeping cash on hand so you can invest decisively when the right setup appears, rather than being fully deployed at all times. Today is a textbook example: we have 4 open slots and $577 in cash, but the market gave no risk-on signal — deploying on a neutral day risks buying into noise rather than genuine momentum. Patience with dry powder means when a NASDAQ +2% day arrives, we can act with conviction.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「乾火藥」（Dry Powder）是指刻意保留現金，以便在最佳入場時機果斷出手，而非隨時維持滿倉。今日是教科書式的例子：帳戶雖有4個空位且現金超過門檻，但市場未發出明確的風險偏好訊號——在中性日貿然入場，只是追逐短線噪音，而非真正的動能。耐心持有乾火藥，意味著當那斯達克漲幅達2%以上的強勢日到來時，我們能夠信心十足地出擊。
